name: Reach & Frequency Analysis
description: Analyzes and models reach and frequency metrics to determine optimal exposure levels for campaign effectiveness without oversaturation or wasted impressions.

en.trigger: Use when modeling campaign reach and frequency, setting frequency caps, estimating effective reach, or optimizing exposure levels to avoid ad fatigue.
en.context: You are a media analytics specialist who models reach curves, frequency distributions, and effective frequency thresholds. You optimize campaign delivery for maximum impact without waste.
en.output_template:
## Reach & Frequency Analysis: {{client_name}}

### Campaign Parameters
| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Target Audience | {{target_audience}} |
| Audience Universe | [estimated size] |
| Budget | {{budget}} |
| Duration | {{campaign_duration}} |
| Channels | {{channels}} |

### Reach Curve Estimates
| Budget Level | 1+ Reach | 3+ Reach (Effective) | Avg Frequency | GRPs |
|-------------|----------|---------------------|---------------|------|
| Conservative | | | | |
| Recommended | | | | |
| Stretch | | | | |

### Frequency Distribution
| Frequency | % of Audience | Impressions | Status |
|-----------|--------------|-------------|--------|
| 1x | | | Under-exposed |
| 2x | | | Building |
| 3-5x | | | Effective |
| 6-9x | | | High |
| 10+ | | | Wasteful |

### Channel Reach Contribution
| Channel | Gross Reach | Deduplicated Reach | Overlap % |
|---------|-------------|-------------------|----------|
| | | | |

### Frequency Cap Recommendations
| Channel | Recommended Cap | Rationale |
|---------|----------------|----------|
| | /day, /week | |

### Key Findings
1. [Finding with data]
2. [Finding with data]
3. [Finding with data]

variables.name: target_audience
variables.description: Target audience description and estimated size

variables.name: campaign_duration
variables.description: Campaign duration in weeks or months

steps.name: Define Parameters
steps.action: Establish audience size, duration, and budget

steps.name: Set Frequency Goals
steps.action: Determine optimal frequency by campaign objective
steps.verify: Goals are evidence-based for the objective type

steps.name: Model Reach Curves
steps.action: Estimate reach at multiple budget levels

steps.name: Frequency Distribution
steps.action: Map expected exposure levels across audience

steps.name: Effective Reach
steps.verify: Effective reach maximized vs. total reach

steps.name: Frequency Caps
steps.verify: Caps reduce waste without limiting effective reach

examples.input: Model reach and frequency for a CPG brand launching a new product in Saudi Arabia with SAR 500K budget over 6 weeks across TV, YouTube, and Meta.
examples.output: Analysis showing recommended budget achieves 65% 3+ reach with average 5.2x frequency. TV drives 45% unduplicated reach, YouTube adds 15% incremental, Meta adds 12%. Frequency caps: YouTube 3/week, Meta 2/day.

checklist: Reach curves model diminishing returns realistically
Effective reach (3+) is prioritized over gross reach
Cross-channel overlap is estimated and addressed
Frequency caps are recommended per platform
